query: SELECT s.id, s.name, s.slug, s.categoryId, s.isActive, s.displayOrder, c.name as categoryName FROM subcategories s LEFT JOIN categories c ON s.categoryId = c.id WHERE s.name LIKE '%mochi%' OR s.name LIKE '%Mochi%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT s.id, s.name, s.slug, s.categoryId, s.isActive, s.displayOrder, c.name as categoryName FROM subcategories s LEFT JOIN categories c ON s.categoryId = c.id WHERE s.name LIKE '%mochi%' OR s.name LIKE '%Mochi%';
